Skill: Thinking Fast and Slow Applied to Product & Architecture
Description: Aplicar insights of Daniel Kahneman sobre Sistema 1 e Sistema 2 for tomar melhores decisoes tecnicas, projetar interfaces que respeitam cognicao humana e avoid biases in code reviews and architecture. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Source Fast and Slow — Daniel Kahneman  ## Objective
Triggers: kahneman, system 1 system 2, cognitive bias, decision making, heuristics, anchoring, confirmation bias, slow thinking, product decisions
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Identificar decisao architecturel ou of product sendo tomada by Sistema 1 (rapido, intuitivo).
- 2. Ativar Sistema 2 — documentar o problema antes of pensar in solucao.
- 3. Gerar 2-3 alternativas e evaluate trade-offs of forma explicita.
- 4. Aplicar pre-mortem — "assumindo que falhou, o que deu errado?"
- 5. Buscar contra-argumento da solucao favorita antes of decide.
Output Contract:
- Analise of alternativas with trade-offs explicitos.
- Pre-mortem with riscos identificados.
- Decisao documentada with contexto e raciocinio.
- Checklist anti-bias for code review.
